hero.heading: About me
intro: I'm Julia Pilch, a physiotherapist who believes good rehabilitation starts with really seeing the person in front of me — their movement, their goals, and the life they're trying to get back to. My practice is grounded in movement, function and an individual approach: I combine careful assessment, hands-on treatment and progressive, achievable exercise rather than a one-size-fits-all protocol.

I work across the full musculoskeletal and rehabilitation spectrum — orthopaedic recovery, sports injuries, post-operative care and therapeutic exercise — and I've built a particular depth in rehabilitation after amputation and limb loss. What I enjoy most is the steady, collaborative work of helping someone move with more confidence than they thought they'd regain.
hero.photoAlt: Julia Pilch working in the clinic with an exercise ball

closing.heading: I'm ready to bring careful, hands-on care to a Trondheim clinic — for the long term.
